chapter_title.en: Chapter on Bequests for Relatives and Freed Slaves

text: 5483 - رَوَى اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ رِئَابٍ عَنْ زُرَارَةَ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي رَجُلٍ أَوْصَى بِثُلُثِ مَالِهِ فِي أَعْمَامِهِ وَ أَخْوَالِهِ فَقَالَ "لِأَعْمَامِهِ اَلثُّلُثَانِ وَ لِأَخْوَالِهِ اَلثُّلُثُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5483 - Al-Hasan bin Mahbub narrated from Ali bin Ri'ab, from Zurara, from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) regarding a man who bequeathed one-third of his wealth to his paternal uncles and maternal uncles.
Imam (as) said: "Two-thirds are for his paternal uncles, and one-third is for his maternal uncles."
